data.body:
[8/6 (Tue) Ban Notice] 

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system.      

▶ Total number of players banned: 42
📷 Period: Permanent 
📷https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2617547

#BlueArhcive
